item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 632
item.description:
1
2

4
5
6
7
8
9

18
19
20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @NerdyPegger made this awesome leather bag. Check out their other work too.
Man Tax: Rege-Jean Page
“We continue to be inspired by the kindness of strangers and draw comfort that — even on the darkest nights — there is hope in the new dawn.” - Elizabeth II I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting only on that, also comment about something you DID like. Balance the negativity. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We're also setting up Jack Box game night and movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work and pretty destitute. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, you are the best. You've helped me so much.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Guess who is back in her silliest hat? If you’re at New York Comic Con tonight, I’d really love to say hi to you.

item.dc:creator: NegasonicAdultEMP

item.title: He's the definite article.
item.description: He's the end boss of kiddie diddling. I don't even have to say his name, and everyone knows who I mean. And not just here on Imgur. Even in the most right wing of circles, as soon as I refer to some generalized person in power as "The Pedophile", they immediately get defensive because they know who I'm talking about. I strongly encourage you to do the same.
item.dc:creator: TheSecondPiewackit

item.title: This makes me very happy.
item.description: María Corina Machado has been announced as the winner of the Nobel Peace Prize 2025 for promoting democratic rights for the people of Venezuela. She is Venezuela’s main opposition leader.
item.dc:creator: amtronic

item.title: My Ada Wong cosplays
item.description: Did a cosplay of one of my fave characters ever, Ada Wong from Resident Evil :3 did her original outfit and the remake one, which on do you like more? For more cosplays feel free to check out instagram.com/tanukiicos c:
item.dc:creator: tanukiicos

item.title: Illinois state troopers arresting protesters for exercising their constitutional rights.
item.dc:creator: CptCheesePants

item.title: Small wholesome dump
item.description: Look, I know some of these might be old or recycled memes but I’m 500 updoots away from 10k and trying to spread some positivity in an otherwise lightless world rn. Would love to hit that milestone however short lived it may be, as I’ll inevitably post a controversial comment that gets downvoted to oblivion sometime soon but I don’t achieve much so let me have this.
item.dc:creator: abujamza

item.title: He won! I knew he had it in him - meaning some vicious diarrhea.
item.dc:creator: LollipopsCorner
